home.subtitle: Your gateway to interactive learning. Explore subjects, dive into themes, and watch curated videos.
home.card1_text: Browse a wide range of subjects from Math to Computer Science.
home.card2_text: Each subject is organized into clear, manageable themes.
home.card3_text: Get quick summaries and links to helpful YouTube videos.

subjects_page.heading: Subjects
subjects_page.themes_explain: Every subject is built from core themes that define its key areas. For example, Mathematics includes Algebra (equations and symbols), Geometry (shapes and space), and Calculus (rates of change). Each theme groups related topics together so you can study step by step. Pick a subject below to see its themes, then click a theme to find topic summaries and videos.

about.heading: About EduLearn
about.p1: EduLearn is a free educational platform designed to make learning simple and accessible. We organize knowledge into subjects and themes, provide quick summaries, and link to high-quality YouTube videos so you can dive deeper.
about.p2: Whether you're a student brushing up on a topic or a curious mind exploring something new, EduLearn helps you find the right content fast.
about.step2: Browse its themes to narrow down your focus.
about.step3: Read a quick summary and watch a recommended video.
about.built_with: Built with PHP, MariaDB, and Bootstrap 5.
